title: [phase:simulate] [family:notebooklm-auth] [provider_hint:codex] Simulate likely causes and recoveries for `nlm auth` failing with `browser auth failed: failed to load page: websocket url timeout reached` on this macOS machine. Use only local evidence. Return concrete next attempts only.
summary_text: 1. `NLM_USE_ORIGINAL_PROFILE` value mismatch (`true` is ignored in this build) -> retry with `1` and force `-all` path: ```bash NLM_USE_ORIGINAL_PROFILE=1 /Users/masayuki/bin/nlm auth login -d -all ``` 2. Original-profile mode collides with open Chrome sessions -> fully close Chrome/Canary, kill leftovers, retry: ```bash osascript -e 'tell application "Google Chrome" to quit' || true osascript -e 'tell application "Google Chrome Canary" to quit' || true pkill -f 'Google Chrome|Google Chrome Canary|nlm-chrome-' || true sleep 2 NLM_USE_ORIGINAL_PROFILE=1 NLM_PROFILE_NAME='Profile 3' /Users/masayuki/bin/nlm auth login -d -all ``` 3. Profile-specific failure -> run scan across all detected profiles (no fixed profile): ```bash NLM_USE_ORIGINAL_PROFILE=1 /Users/masayuki/bin/nlm auth login -d -all ``` 4. DevTools websocket bootstrap failure in Chrome itself -> isolate with a direct local probe: ```bash TMP_DIR=$(mktemp -d /Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/nlm-devtools.XXXXXX) "/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome" \ --remote-debugging-port=9555 --remote-debugging-address=127.0.0.1 \ --user-data-dir="$TMP_DIR" --no-first-run --no-default-browser-check about:blank \ >/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/chrome-devtools.log 2>&1 & sleep 3 curl -sS http://127.0.0.1:9555/json/version ls -la "$TMP_DIR/DevToolsActivePort" ``` 5. If Chrome probe fails, test Canary the same way (local binary/runtime issue triage): ```bash TMP_DIR=$(mktemp -d /Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/nlm-devtools-canary.XXXXXX) "/Applications/Google Chrome Canary.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome Canary" \ --remote-debugging-port=9555 --remote-debugging-address=127.0.0.1 \ --user-data-dir="$TMP_DIR" --no-first-run --no-default-browser-check about:blank \ >/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/canary-devtools.log 2>&1 & sleep 3 curl -sS http://127.0.0.1:9555/json/version ls -la "$TMP_DIR/DevToolsActivePort" ``` 6. Capture a definitive retry log for diffing with prior failures: ```bash NLM_USE_ORIGINAL_PROFILE=1 NLM_PROFILE_NAME='Profile 3' /Users/masayuki/bin/nlm auth login -d -all \ 2>&1 | tee /Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/nlm-auth-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).log ```
